notes: SENSITIVE TOPIC — calm, documentary, professional. NEVER depict sick/dead birds, hazmat drama, red warning colours, crisis mood, or any on-image text. Focus on the calm professional response: distance, documentation, PPE, zones. Australian settings.

images.context: Course hero image for 'Australian H5 Bird Flu Awareness' — the calm, in-scope professional response
images.prompt: A calm, documentary-style photograph of an Australian coastal wetland in soft morning light, with a few migratory seabirds visible at a respectful distance on the far shoreline. In the foreground, a restoration and facility professional in clean hi-vis workwear stands calmly holding a rugged tablet, observing and taking notes while keeping a clear distance. Measured, reassuring, professional mood. Natural Australian coastal landscape, realistic photography.
images.negativePrompt: no dead or sick birds, no close-up of birds, no hazmat suits, no red warning colours, no crisis or emergency mood, no smoke or blood, no on-image text, no logos or watermarks

images.context: Module on worker safety, PPE and clean/dirty zones
images.prompt: A clean, orderly worksite photograph at an Australian facility entrance showing a clearly demarcated clean-and-dirty zone: floor tape marking, a worker methodically putting on gloves and a respirator while following a checklist on a clipboard. Bright, procedural, professional, reassuring. Realistic photography.
images.negativePrompt: no dead or sick birds, no crisis mood, no red hazard colours, no on-image text, no logos or watermarks

images.context: Module on documentation and the RestoreAssist reporting pathway
images.prompt: An Australian facility professional in hi-vis workwear calmly documenting observations on a rugged tablet at a building exterior under overcast daylight, with a clipboard visible. The focus is careful, unhurried documentation and professionalism. Realistic photography.
images.negativePrompt: no birds, no crisis mood, no on-image text, no logos or watermarks
